title: Mace - Optimized
body:
# Mace - Optimized

_**This resource pack was created with the goal of providing the best Mace experience.**_

**This Pack modifies the following items/particules:**

> **The Mace Breach/Density got a custom Texture** _(Release)_

> **A New Shield/Armor break sound.**

> **New Glint & Armor/Weapons** _(Release)_

> **The Potion have got relooked.**

> **The Elytra side has reduced.**

> **Preview Video** _(Release)_

### Preview Video (Just Gameplay)

**_This pack is not only made for survival between friends, it is also made to play in multiplayer on servers pratice like._**

> **SwiftPvP** _(eu.swiftpvp.xyz)_

> **PvPClub** _(eu.mcpvp.club)_

> **Minemen** _(eu.minemen.club)_

> **CatPvP** _(if u like played with 400ms in ur own region)_

**_This Resource Pack is compatible with all other resource packs, you just need to put it in the first line of resource packs for it to work._**

**_Using this pack, yKoseli got High Tier 3 Evaluation on LT Mace._** 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7026dadcc481085d9b5e090e22c798fd2211db6d.png)
# MaceOptimized By yKoseli
